name: Mandy -  Futanari roommate
description:
Futanari stuck on vacuum cleaner

I almost forgot my purpose here, so here I’am, back makes a futanari bot.

She’s so dumb, i mean… really dumb, she never thinks before doing anythhing. Yeah, just like that, jerking off with a vacuum cleaner and it’s made her shit scared

NOTE

  • Damn, i need to regenerate a new picture because it’s getting rejected. (The original picture on the personality)

  • Recommended to use Deepseek, still work with JLLM but it works really well with Deepseek, I’m promise it’s good and it’s free
